description: 1q22 — histone methyltransferase H3K36; also de novo variants
14q32 — BAF chromatin remodeling, striatal MSN differentiation (TSAICG 2024)
3p21 — planar cell polarity, axon guidance; also de novo variants
13q12 — receptor tyrosine kinase; first GWS locus (Yu 2019)
Xp11 — monoamine oxidase A, monoamine catabolism
13q31 — Nedd4 family interacting protein 2, ubiquitin signaling (TSAICG 2024)
2p16 — neurexin 1, synaptic adhesion; also rare deletions
9p24 — receptor protein tyrosine phosphatase delta; also ADHD GWAS
15q21 — semaphorin, axon guidance in CSTC circuits
13q31 — axon guidance; first TS gene (Abelson 2005 Science)
